entry.title: Manual_OuterWilds_Nicopopxd v7.0.0
entry.content:
## What's Changed
All the changes were done in PR #2 and documentation changes do in #6
But you can find a more detailed changelog below
### Options changes:
- Every options now track if they are randomized or not that mean a full `random`/`randomized` yaml is possible and should always work - it does mean that on the webhost you have both random and randomized option but that was the Price to pay to have it work on the Option Creator - Some Advanced options were added that let you completly remove most items/location from generation but they can make generation fail so they are hidden into the weighted option page
### Client changes
To include support for multiple feature in open PRs on the main Manual repo, I decided to temporarily force my version of the client in the launcher. In the launcher you'll be able to search for `Manual Client Nico's Experiment` to find it its compatible with everything the normal client supports and even more feature that will probably get merged sooner or later Here's a short list of things added that have not yet been merged (if checked mean merged)
- [ ] Item and location alias to protect against spoiler and to help remind you if you chose to require Solanum and/or the Prisoner - [x] The possibility to scout some locations directly in the client - [ ] Unused in this apworld is the code to support UT Glitched logic
### Logic changes
- Almost every location were renamed to be spoiler free - Those that weren't, were already safe - Some of the items were also renamed to be safe - Some DLC items were fused together to simplify logic a bit - "DreamWorld Fake Fireplace", "DreamWorld Fake Wall" ->"Ghost Wall Patch" - "DreamWorld Grabbing Hands", "DreamWorld Hidden Hand" -> "Totem Hands Patch" - In the past there were copies of location that would give you an item called something like "visited X", they were all replaced with events - Technical: This apworld now uses the lastest Manual source as of this release which include conversion to use Rule builder which let you whats just below this list:
**In doubt of a location's requirement, you can do /explain [Location] in the client and it will tell you what you need for said location**
Please report any bugs/issues either on [Github](https://github.com/nicopop/ManualApworlds/issues) or on Discord
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nicopop/ManualApworlds/compare/6.5.1...OW7.0.0

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.4.2
entry.content:
**It is heavily recommend you use t7patch**
- **(New)** PhD Flopper - Added to Wunderfizz - (Moon) Widow's Wine has been moved to Tunnel 6 - Not available on Shadows of Evil - Explosive weapons are considered stronger in logic if PhD Flopper is also unlocked (Raygun, XM-53 etc) - **(New)** Moon Support: - Save System: - The usual (doors, power, rounds, loadouts) - Easter Egg steps up until picking up the charged Vril Generator to start the final MPD soul fill sequence - Vril Sphere reaching the MPD will only save if the buttons in the lab are done - Each of the 3 Space Dog toys shot with the wave gun - Breaches are **not** saved and restored, however the Vril Sphere being spawned by tunnel 6 breach is - Patch broken official script for No Man's Land to switch to Supersprinters after 2 minutes - RNG Adjustment - Digger RNG (default on) - Makes the digger for tunnel 6 activate soon after round 16 - RNG Adjustment - Mystery Box RNG (default on) - Uses Revelations style custom weights to increase odds of required weapons appearing - After the box moves, starts counting box spins - 8 spins without doubles the odds - 16 spins without triple the odds - Checks: - Turn on the Power - Main Easter Egg (11 checks) - Skill check - Land safely on a cushion - Hacker (4 checks) - Excavator, Window, Mystery Box and Pack-A-Punch - Space Dog Easter Egg (5 checks) - 4 Music Easter Eggs - Round checks and round saves are now done during 'between round over'. This should fix issues with the wrong round number being used on some maps. - If max round with check has to be increased for gen to succeed, goal round will no longer be increased with it - New Checks: - `Turn on the Power` for The Giant and Gorod Krovi - `Masamune - Build the Wonder Weapon` for Zetsubou No Shima - Disabled partial Void Bow restoration on Der Eisendrache temporarily

entry.title: Ratchet & Clank 3 v0.5.0
entry.content:
## RaC3 APWorld v0.5.0 **Branch:** main **Date:** 2026-04-15 17:16 UTC
📜 Summary (833 changes since v0.4.1) - RAC3: Clarify vendor options to say that disabling them wont make them vanilla apart from ship vendor. (f574e15c) - RAC3: Only attempt to restore vendor item names if they have been modified (85695479) - RAC3: Use a dict for blackscreen original values (e5ea4c12) - RAC3: Fix blackscreen trap on PAL (d4a0cc9a) - RAC3: Add missing mode parameter to linux pine socket (965f7c78) - RAC3: Update pine library to latest pypine (83c3b09d) - RAC3: Adjust early nanotech logic to closer match vanilla (407da211) - RAC3: Fix ship vendor saying "(null)" when no items are available (3dfde35a) - RAC3: Apply same fix to overwrite vendor item names (792e5425) - RAC3: Fix potential KeyError in restore vendor item names (143c30f8) - RAC3: Move nanotech and ngplus region connections from menu to phoenix (1a09e76e) - RAC: Run Ruff on more files (b50029de) - RAC3: Rework Scout Vendors to OptionCounter, add Ship Vendor hints (4f85d17b) - RAC3: Remove vid comics from the item pool if disabled (117ddf8d) - RAC3: Address pda vendor bolt difference edge case (01be92f4) - RAC3: Clarify skin vendor and its effect on rando cosmetics (6c541522) - RAC3: Fix PDA vendor stealing your bolts and not granting you the check in some instances (130c09f7) - RAC3: Run Ruff Formatter (d9e405c9) - RAC3: Use Enum constant instead of hardcoded magic number (9edec31f) - RAC3: Only attempt to add vendor locations to code cave if their associated yaml options are enabled (cde910c0) - RAC3: Add TODO about vendor scouting (c57783e1) - RAC3: Add Scout Vendors yaml option (0072615c) - RAC3: Typo fix in FAQ (5b1d9f21) - RAC3: Add extra safeguards to version checking (3f682313) - RAC3: Minor cleanup of self.vehicle conditions (cae23c13) - RAC3: Make 1 Hit KO trap also set vehicle health to 1 (fa210465) - RAC3: Add armor vendor to suggested yaml option changes if not enough locations (2260eaf9) - RAC3: Fix item name restoration on PAL (ae51ac52) - RAC3: Fix wrong offsets on Armor strings (368edb37) - RAC3: Fix wrong offsets on some megacorp weapons (79cf7bd4) - RAC3: Fix KeyError when opening the vendor (49756729) - RAC3: Show AP item name directly in the weapon and armor vendors (76283513) - Write weapon vendor and armor vendor locations to code cave too (dab82088) - RAC3: For real this time (7acc800e) - RAC3: Fix all the issues with who receives what and when in the hint notifications (6b9a0688) - RAC3: Fix other player's name not showing up in game (bc6337bc) - RAC3: Fix unknown item for hint for other players (e6916f88) - RAC3: Fix newline typo in hint notification (3d8e00ad) - RAC3: Specify other player's name if not self hint (28928463) - RAC3: Change other player's name color to green instead of white in the hint notifications (fe16e17c) - RAC3: Display hints in game (7a574ab5) - RAC3: Fix Blackscreen Trap not working in the sewers (c527e703) - RAC3: Use the DeathLink class from Archipelago rather than our own (50fc2f1f) - RAC3: Fix No Ammo Trap not clearing N60 storm ammo (b954a310) - RAC3: Fix N60 getting 406 ammo on reconnect (9f3f6378) - RAC3: Fix Blackscreen Trap and readd it (a3c507d7) - RAC3: Auto Equip lightsaber wrench when received (0ed0f1c9) - RAC3: Refactor how patches are handled (11ffeda1) - RAC3: Fix Hypershot getting removed from quick select when travelling to the phoenix (8998a0bb) - RAC3: Make the lightsaber wrench replacement an AP item (b47bc0fa) - RAC3: Make numbers slightly wider (90dd00b5) - RAC3: Update Documentation (c65078cd) - RAC3: rework text width calculation for messagebox (235ab71f) - RAC3: Change default version number and display dev build warning if "dev" is in the version number (1061c2d7) - RAC3: Add RY3NO to Phoenix vendor on UT map (c684a6d7) - RAC3: Add ship vendor locations to UT map (db4f25d3) - RAC3: Buff player exp filler slightly (cd59251a) - RAC3: Use game interface's vendortype in handle_vendors (6a043fe0) - RAC3: return None if vendortype cannot be resolved in vendor_check (609ce2cb) - RAC3: Check if vendors are enabled before trying to hint any locations (132a87c2) - RAC3: Make PAL version warning say that PAL support is in beta (344d4f8d) - RAC3: Update FAQ to say that PAL is mostly supported now (705c1bbd) - RAC3: Update FAQ and Setup guide with version differences (5c6a871a) - RAC3: PAL Support: Make PDA Vendor work on PAL (6e34740c) - RAC3: Experimental PAL support (7d4acd92) - RAC3: Add more info to rac3_info (9ba8b193) - RAC3: Make one hp challenge toggle message more user friendly (d6eca342) - RAC3: Development build warning grammar fixes (e05d4071) - RAC3: Tell the user to launch RaC3 rather than checking PINE if emulator is connected but game not connected (e3e41d88) - RAC3: Normailze notification time if overwritten with less than 1.5 seconds remaining (b84209c5) - RAC3: Pause notifications when paused + remove reduntant gadget removal function (9e179e09) - RAC3: minor cleanup in notification cycler (638c0b06) - RAC3: Only remove gadgets during cutscenes if you havent checked their associated location (4d620424) - RAC3: Dont try to display notifications when paused (e44a3d03) - RAC3: Use self.vendortype in vendor update instead of reading it again (8572081b) - RAC3: Remove unnecessary whitespace(s) (d3b2bf86) - RAC3: Fix weapon level up item leveling up the temporarily deleveled weapons (5a69f198) - RAC3: Fix nano-pak flickering among other things (0f4717ad) - RAC3: Fix gadgets disappearing after a cutscene (8a853d12) - RAC3: Add the remaining 101st sewer crystal (b25377a9) - RAC3: Fix Hit the motherload location getting skipped when it shouldn't (c40d9892) - RAC3: Fix not being able to buy weaker armor and add memory cards back into the vendor (6ed64f6e) - RAC3: Replace unsupported characters in notifications with a question mark (412a02b3) - RAC3: Add skin vendor reading support (ceb6722b) - RAC3: Only reset notification time if the notifications expired (c131df1f) - RAC3: Cap the bolt filler at 200k (9f46cecc) - RAC3: Fix armor vendor yaml option description (2915eb3d) - RAC3: Rework the bolt filler (378c2534) - RAC3: Add Armor Vendor Locations (8ba03ba0) - RAC3: Make progress on removing dead planets (aec019aa) - RAC3: minor optimization (36c6d09c) - RAC3: Add a dead seed checker to generation (cb09fccf) - RAC3: Make excluded count only matter if solo seed (dd2651a7) - RAC3: Subtract excluded count from location count (c2933a10) - RAC3: Reset code cave on reconnect (02893d34) - RAC3: Adjust ship vendor item costs (b0176119) - RAC3: Make /force_update trigger a reset of the code cave (92701eaf) - RAC3: Make code cave setup more reliable (82226d8e) - RAC3: Account for infobot: veldin counting in the list of unlocked planets (97905374) - RAC3: Make the ship vendor option description up to date (8e7d311e) - RAC3: Put AP item names into the ship vendor (f3d40cb2) - RAC3: Add ship vendor locations (f6243ae5) - RAC3: Fix v2-v5 weapons showing up in the vendor (7af95d2c) - RAC3: Fix progressive weapons causing v2-v5 showing up in the vendor (ebadd3f2) - RAC3: Hint vendor items when the weapon vendor opens (dc321488) - RAC3: Make the holo shield glove available in the vendor after momma tyhrranoid has been defeated rather than immediately (819792dc) - RAC3: Aquatos vendor location name changes (a877586a) - RAC3: Vendor checks naming rework (88be8180) - RAC3: Seperate Gadgetron and Megacorp weapons (e15eb56a) - RAC3: Fix max ammo not working for weapons both in your inventory and the vendor (fd1c11d2) - RAC3: Exclude the PDA from vendor update (f180a2d4) - RAC3: Allow updates on empty vendors (620df1e8) - RAC3: Make it pretty again (ce72efbd) - RAC3: Fix runtime errors and make it work again (d172fd05) - RAC3: Refactor: Vendor Handler (a76f665e) - RAC3: Cleanup Vendor implementation (bc8ea236) - RAC3: Make RY3N0 available from the start, but keep the logic requirement (ab300d61) - RAC3: Fix RY3N0 unlocked earlier than it was supposed to (21a0fab1) - RAC3: Add logic to the RY3N0 vendor location (689ccfe0) - RAC3: Fix slim cognito (aa672cfb) - RAC3: Minor cleanup (904d656a) - RAC3: Fix cursor landing out of bounds when buying the item in the way (2f76fdd6) - RAC3: Add RY3NO as a vendor location check (683d9f9a) - RAC3: Move visited planets and weapon vendor items to early update and reuse references (93f9cdb7) - RAC3: Only remove weapons in the vendor from inventory (9222bd6d) - RAC3: Dont cycle vendors if weapon vendors are off in the yaml (5f64b5b6) - RAC3: Make working weapon vendors (d750eeeb) - RAC3: Split bigger vendor functions into multiple functions (a7267c69) - RAC3: Basic Vendor cycling (3b5d7098) - RAC3: Add functionality to add items to the vendor (e2c7d92e) - RAC3: Propose Vendor Class Structure (9296c14f) - RAC3: Make Vendor Classes (75aa7e5f) - RAC3: Add a tiny bit about how to continue a previous session (ffe48a87) - RAC3: Stop recommending Archipelago version 0.5.0 as the minimum (74b48c04) - RAC3: Address feedback in setup guide (6f3545e6) - RAC3: Fix minor grammatical inconsistencies (daa02af9) - RAC3: Add section about hosting a MultiWorld (d8b4e042) - RAC3: Address setup doc feedback (b3596073) - RAC3: Docs: Clarify how to connect to the MultiServer (7f07906f)\n- ...and 633 more commits.
**Full changelog and compare**: https://github.com/Taoshix/Archipelago-RaC3/compare/v0.4.1...v0.5.0 ### [Setup Guide](https://github.com/Taoshix/Archipelago-RaC3/blob/staging/worlds/rac3/docs/setup_en.md) ### Notes This release was automatically generated from the **main** branch. Latest (main) releases are recommended, as pre-releases (staging) may contain experimental or in-progress changes. ### If a location is broken and does not get sent out Go to the server console (locally or via the Archipelago room page) and run: `/send_location ` Example: `/send_location TaoshiRaC3 "Crash Site: Infobot: Aridia"`

entry.title: Stacklands v0.2.5
entry.content:
# Information This mod is still in development, so it is possible that it may contain bugs or issues - please familiarise yourself with the [known issues list](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/Stacklands-Randomizer/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen) before using this mod to see how your experience may be affected.
If you experience a bug/issue that is _not_ in the list, please raise a new github issue or post it in the [Stacklands Forum in the Archipelago Discord Server](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1151149079238299719)
**PLEASE NOTE:** This version _**is not compatible**_ with worlds generated using APWorld v0.2.4 or earlier.
## How to Install / Use the Mod All instructions for how to install and use the mod are in the [README.md](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/Stacklands-Randomizer?tab=readme-ov-file#how-to-install-the-mod-to-stacklands)
# Patch Notes ## APWorld - Fixed #94 causing goal bosses to be selected incorrectly for `all_bosses` when multiple boards selected. - Fixed a recently discovered issue causing worlds with more than one Stacklands player to accidentally share boss selection and filler/trap weightings.
## Mod Client - Replaced `"Complete X quests to unlock"` text when hovering over locked booster packs and will now display which AP item is required. - Added a `Research at University` check _(give 50 gold to University structure)_ - Updated game save naming to allow playing multiple slots in a single multiworld. - Re-worked quest/location syncing in an attempt to further fix #93 causing checks to only send on restart. - Fixed #96 causing `University` to behave as per vanilla - Updated `Archipelago.MultiClient.Net` version to `6.7.1` - `archipelago.json` file provided to meet future `v0.7.0` manifest requirements.

entry.title: Dark Cloud 1 v0.4.4.1
entry.content:
# Dark Cloud 1 AP Rando v0.4.4.1
# Change Fixed a rare bug breaking atla randomization if the Moon Sea's first floor has zero atla
Client change only

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.9.4
entry.content: Fixed TombKings ritual items causing client disconnection.

entry.title: Backlog Expedition v1.2.1
entry.content:
## New in this version - Added support for drawing a random selection of backlog games - Changed the way backlog games are added, to be more streamlined - Added better descriptions to options - Added error handling, that will now issue warnings when numbers are off during generation
## Notes about this version - Compatible with v.2.0.0 of the game
## Learn more about this AP-world - [Setup guide](https://github.com/Nikkilites/Archipelago-BacklogExpedition-APWorld/blob/main/docs/setup_en.md) - [Info](https://github.com/Nikkilites/Archipelago-BacklogExpedition-APWorld/blob/main/docs/en_Backlog%20Expedition.md)

entry.title: Nine Sols v0.5.3
entry.content:
For installation instructions [see the README](https://github.com/Ixrec/NineSolsArchipelagoRandomizer?tab=readme-ov-file#installation).
- Fixed softlocks in the 3D Printer's Create and Recycle menus - The Recycle menu would softlock whenever you had less than 5 types of items to recycle - Similarly, the Create menu would often softlock whenever shop rando was turned off, because this menu can have as little as 4 items in vanilla, but always more than that with shop rando on - `vanilla` logic: - "CTH: Side Room Near Right Exit" logic was missing Wall Climb - `ledge_storage` logic: - "Factory (PA): Behind Fire in Lower Left Vents" now allows AD setup into LS parry vault - "CTH - Bottom of Large Shaft" to "Yanren Arena" now allows using LS slash vault inside the red tunnel to reset air movement - The climb to "Cortex Center - Caves Upper Right" now allows using LS parry vault to jump to the last rope instead of TCK or CL - The trek to ED (Passages)'s Tianshou Arena now allows a combination of bow hover and wall slide to bypass the ziplines without Grapple - "AF (Depths): Under Lower Left Exit" now allows LS parry vault to reach the last rope instead of CL or Grapple - "Collected Pipe Upgrade" message was missing a period. Now it has a period.

entry.title: Hunie Pop 2 v3.0.3
entry.content:
- (APWorld) fixed YMAL option boss_wings_requirement being higher than number of pairs in logic when generating and fixed warning for it not showing in logs V3.0.2 Changelog - (Client) update Archipelago.MultiClient.Net to fix problem when connecting V3.0.1 Changelog - (Client) fixed processing of "Fruit Seeds" items - (Client) added bunch of debug stuff - (GitHub) added PopTracker to repo and releases V3.0.0 Changelog - (repo) Merged APWorld and Client to one git repository - (APWorld/Client) Added option/logic to randomise girl like/disliked tokens, baggage, unique/shoe gifts - (APWorld) Rebuilt APWorld - (APWorld) Added archipelago.json to APWorld for archipelago 0.7.0 compatibility - (Client) Added BepInEx to zip file for easier installing - (Client) Made arch items in the shop have the archipelago logo - (Client) Removed temp baggage - (Client) Made girl detail screen show what unique/shoe gifts you haven't given yet
BACKUP YOU ORIGINAL SAVE CANT GUARANTEE THAT IT WONT GET CORRUPTED Windows save location: "C:/Users/{YOUR USERNAME}/AppData/LocalLow/HuniePot/HuniePop 2 - Double Date/" Mac save location: "/Users/{YOUR USERNAME}/Library/Application Support/com.HuniePot.HuniePop2-DoubleDate/" CLIENT INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Hunie Pop 2 Installed - Download Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago plugin.zip" to the directory where "HuniePop 2 - Double Date.exe" is - play and connect to a Archipelago server APWORLD INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Huniepop 2 APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Huniepop 2 APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recomended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default Huniepop 2 YMAL POPTRACKER INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - copy contents of "Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago PopTracker.zip" into the packs folder in the poptracker install directory

entry.title: Lego Star Wars: The Complete Saga v1.4.0
entry.content:
# New - Standing in front of a locked Chapter Door will tell you the missing items to unlock that Chapter, or that the Chapter is not enabled - Episode Doors in the Cantina are forcefully opened if they contain any enabled Chapters - When locking Chapters by Vanilla Characters (previously called Story Characters), the requirements to unlock each Chapter can now alternatively use the Purchase Characters, the characters that would, in vanilla, become available for purchase after completing the Chapter. There are `{episode}-{chapter} Purchase Unlock Characters` item groups for these Purchase Characters - When locking Chapters by Vanilla Characters (previously called Story Characters), there is a new option to remove any combination of `R2-D2`, `C-3PO` and `Chewbacca` from being included in chapter unlock requirements due to the large number of chapters they can each individually lock access to - Chapters can now optionally be locked by entirely Random Characters, with options to determine the size of the pool of characters to use in unlock requirements (a smaller pool means characters will more often be required by multiple chapters), and options to specify how many additional characters above the required number are present in the requirements, e.g. needing 4/5 (1 extra) or 4/6 (2 extra) characters instead of needing exactly 4/4 - Save and Exit to Cantina is now available without having completed the current Chapter - A `Chapter Unlocks` item group has been added for Chapter Unlock items, which can be used to `!hint Chapter Unlocks` to hint for the logically earliest, unfound Chapter Unlock item - Universal Tracker will now show available purchase locations, that are not logically expected until you have a higher Score Multiplier, as 'Glitched'
# Changes - The Story Characters Chapter Unlock Requirement has been renamed to Vanilla Characters, the `story_characters` value in old yamls will be interpreted as `vanilla_characters` - The game will now automatically pick IG-88 and 4-LOM in your Free Play selection to fulfil the role of Protocol Droids - When running the client from a command line/script, the client will now accept server address and password arguments - When Chapters are locked by needing Characters, there are now options to specify the min and max required counts of those characters, with options to bias the required counts towards the min, the max, and the middle, or pick uniformly between the min and max. - The `{episode}-{chapter} Unlock Characters` item groups have been renamed to `{episode}-{chapter} Story Unlock Characters`
# Removed - The `Chapter Unlock Characters` item group has been removed
# Fixes - Restored the ability to connect to older, compatible seeds when Universal Tracker is installed (Universal Tracker integration will be disabled when your local APWorld does not match close enough to the APWorld version used to generate the multiworld) - Death Link support has been internally reorganised to hopefully avoid cases where receiving a Death Link could send a new Death Link if the game was alt-tabbed - Added the missing `Ride B'omarr Monk` in 6-1 to Ridesanity - Riding a normally un-killable character when receiving a Death Link now forcefully sets the respawn timer in-case the un-killable character does not normally respawn - Death Link will try to avoid killing players that are currently using a vent/chute as a Shortie character - `Luke Skywalker (Dagobah)` can now lift the X-Wing at the end of 5-4 - `Yoda` and `Yoda (Ghost)` have slightly increased movement speed in the beginning section of 3-6 so that the AI controlled player no longer dies repeatedly and prevents continuing with the level - Fixed a few issues causing the items added to the item pool to be in a non-deterministic order (possible to result in non-deterministic generation only if another apworld is doing rogue behaviour things)
# Logic - The Imperial ability is no longer logically required to complete 3-3 or 6-5 - Removed the Sith ability requirement from LEGO City completion - Added missing Protocol Droid requirement to 2-2 Minikits - Added missing Astromech Panel requirement to 5-2 Power Brick
# Known issues - Logic expects you to not be able to enter levels until you can complete them, but now that is it possible to Save and Exit without completing a level, it is possible to get Power Bricks out-of-logic. This will not be fixed until the logic is rewritten

entry.title: Dracomino v0.3.0
entry.content: # Version 0.3.0 *Compatible with game version 0.3.0 and up* ## New Items - Add Kick ability - Add Lock Delay - Add Tutorial and Logic Tutorial - Add Time for Fishing! - Add Pixellation Trap - Add Crystal Trap - Add Fracture Trap - Add Water Trap - Add Invert Colors Trap - Add Well Done! - Add Zoom Trap - Add Impatience Trap - Add In Space! - Add Enchantments - Add Curses - Add Egg ## Options - Add Trap Link Option - Add Energy Link Option

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.5.5
entry.content:
## Added - Death link option
## Bug Fix - Monkey village pop-tier checks no longer generate

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.4.2
entry.content:
Mod update only, no apworld update
- Support for both the New (Feb 2026) BO3 client and the Old BO3 client, thanks to @Scroptss for helping update the offsets - Separate downloads - Moon: - Fix Space Dog toy checks having the wrong name @eah1759 - Fix Electric Cherry incorrectly awarding Widow's Wine - Fix PhD Flopper being available on Shadows of Evil via random perk powerup - Fix Moon round saving not working - Restructure round end saving to not risk conflicting with checkpointing

entry.title: Spyro 3 v1.3.5
entry.content:
This release contains both Client (S3AP.Desktop.exe) and APWorld changes. The new client is compatible with in progress seeds generated on version 1.3.0+.
Bug Fixes: - Fixed a bug where Item Link could fail to generate - Fixed a bug where the Spike and Scorch goals failed to release in Open World mode.

entry.title: Ratchet & Clank 3 v0.5.1
entry.content:
## RaC3 APWorld v0.5.1 **Branch:** staging **Date:** 2026-04-17 16:59 UTC
📜 Summary (23 changes since v0.5.0) - RAC3: fix some formatting (2a5330b5) - RAC3: Add helper function for enqueing and dequeing notifications (186a627a) - RAC3: Refactor: Notification Message Data Structure (eed52887) - RAC3: Fix scout_vendors file naming and clarify scout vendors effect on item names inside vendors (9a18d076)
**Full changelog and compare**: https://github.com/Taoshix/Archipelago-RaC3/compare/v0.5.0...v0.5.1 ### [Setup Guide](https://github.com/Taoshix/Archipelago-RaC3/blob/staging/worlds/rac3/docs/setup_en.md) ### Notes This release was automatically generated from the **staging** branch. Latest (main) releases are recommended, as pre-releases (staging) may contain experimental or in-progress changes. ### If a location is broken and does not get sent out Go to the server console (locally or via the Archipelago room page) and run: `/send_location ` Example: `/send_location TaoshiRaC3 "Crash Site: Infobot: Aridia"`

entry.title: Elder Scrolls Online v0.3.0
entry.content:
As this is a prerelease, **there may be several bugs that could take from the experience or result in the creation of an unbeatable seed**, This release should only be used for those who want to test out the new features or want to help find bugs ~~or those who dont care and just want to play anyways~~
Honestly, I think I found most of the bugs. Any remaining unknown bugs are likely located in the client or mod, which means that a hotfix should be able to fix them without the need to generate a new game. That being said, I cannot guarantee this is the case, so don't say I didn't warn you.
## Whats New - Completely redone Mod and APWorld code - Added Delve access items and completion locations - New Goal: Dungeon Delver, complete every delve included in your seed - changed the wayshrine checks to activate when interacting with the wayshrine, not just first discovery. This is for those who want to use an existing character for the AP run - Added new system to prevent players from interacting with interactables that lead to locked zones - Added new system to block traveling to other zones via dialogue with an NPC - Added new system to limit how much gold the player can have on them - New Options - Delves_per_region: How many delves to include from each zone, goes up to 18, set to 0 to disable zone locations and locking - Enable Main Quests: to enable and disable locations for the main quest, must be enabled for the main quest goal or if coldharbour is your goal for zone quest goal - enable Wayshine checks: to enable and disable checks for interacting with wayshrines - base gold cap: what you want the gold cap to be without any wallet increase items, set to 0 to enable gold limiting - More that I can't remember off the top of my head
## Known Bugs: - Leaving the client on for an extended period of time can result in the client wiping all items sent to the mod, meaning the game may tell you that you don't have something you should have. If this occurs, you should just be able to close and reopen the client, and upon reconnection, it should fix all items sent to the game. Ill be looking into what causes this but its likely a 0.4.0+ issue to fix for when I rewrite the client like I did with the apworld and mod in this one - Setting your goal region to random can cause it to pick a region inaccessible with a low zone count, causing generation errors. This error occurs at the beginning of generation, so you should know if there's a problem pretty quick. You can avoid this by manually choosing a goal zone or trying to regen so it picks a different zone until you get it to work. Note that the lower you set the zone count, the more likely this is to occur. I will be looking into fixing this before 0.3.0 proper. - Controller can break on reloads, Ill be looking into this fairly soon. Can be worked around by reloadUI until controller works

entry.title: Flipwitch Forbidden Sex Hex v1.1.0.post2
entry.content:
Changes: - Complete port to rules builder. - This *should* allow /explain and the like in Universal Tracker to work. - Some rules are still a bit archaic (some option oriented things), can be cleaned up later.
Bugfixes: - Fixed rules for some experience quests, which were missing some potential rules. - Removed Pot 2 from Tengoku Gardens so it cannot be missed - This is temporary; the check has not been sending and needs to be properly fixed but I'm a bit spread thin.

entry.title: Crash2 v0.3.0
entry.content:
Big update, here's everything new since v0.2.0
### Warp Randomizer: - Option to randomize the warp room portals to lead to different levels - Collected gem/crystal locations will show up in their vanilla location - Secret warp room portals are not currently randomized due to some bugs - Supports Universal Tracker
### Traps: - Customizable chance to replace filler life/wumpa items with traps with a customizable duration - Small Crash Trap & Big Crash Trap - Scales Crash's size accordingly - Small Crash is disabled in levels that feature Polar due to a buggy interaction - No Lives Trap - Temporarily lose all your lives - Jetpack Controls - 😵
### Options: - New Option to fill wumpa checks locally - This is to prevent other worlds from getting clogged with Crash 2 filler when playing fruitsanity - New Option to exclude difficult wumpa checks - This will prevent wumpas in difficult/annoying spots from containing useful items (affected locations have a "*" in their name) - Updated some option descriptions to be more detailed and added option groups
### Other Additions: - When playing fruitsanity, wumpa fruit are now collected permanently - This is true even after restarting / reconnecting the client - Added the two wumpas from Cold Hard Crash that I previously thought were unobtainable as actual checks
### Bug Fixes: - Letting the demo run will no longer collect wumpa fruit checks
### Known Issues: - When using warp randomizer, exiting Totally Fly always puts you in the 4th warp room, which can give access to the 4th warp room early - Also use [GitHub issues](https://github.com/Sim10XXX/C2AP/issues) or the [Crash 2 AP thread](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1371461990794657863) to report bugs or suggest stuff

entry.title: Golden Sun The Lost Age v0.2.3b0
entry.content:
Game description is [here](https://github.com/cjmang/Archipelago/blob/gstla/worlds/gstla/docs/en_Golden%20Sun%20The%20Lost%20Age.md). (Don't expect the link to the options page to work.)
Game setup guide is [here](https://github.com/cjmang/Archipelago/blob/gstla/worlds/gstla/docs/setup_en.md).
To install the AP World, use the Archipelago Launcher's Install APWorld button, or just copy and paste gstla.apworld into your custom_worlds folder. Once the apworld is installed you can find a yaml after running Generate Template Options in the AP Launcher, or by using the Options Creator.
In general this AP World implementation relies heavily on the existing randomizer, which you can find here: https://gs2randomiser.com/en/index.html
Please reach out in the [GSTLA Post in Future Game Design on the AP discord if you find issues.](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1055515261270241320).
Changes in this release: - Moved sphere scaling from `generate_output` to `stage_finalize_multiworld`. This does two things: (1) no more race conditions (2) sphere calculations are done once for all GSTLA slots. - Fixed an issue with mimic scaling that didn't properly place items. - Fixed a typo with Taopo
Note: Archipelago version 0.6.7+ is required. It will not work on 0.6.6 or earlier versions.

entry.title: Dicey Dungeons v0.3.0b0
entry.content:
## What's Changed
- Thief is now a playable character. When you select the Thief, you will have access to their episodes and equipment, and will need to beat their 6 episodes to win.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Fylcoast/AP_diceydungeons/compare/v0.2.5-beta...v0.3.0-beta
PLEASE NOTE: This is the single largest update since v0.1.0-beta, so it is the most likely to have bugs and be unstable. A lot of changes had to be made to support a second character. I do not recommend this version for large syncs.

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.3.post2
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.3
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Spirit Tracks v0.7.4
entry.content:
Compatible with seeds generated in v0.7.x [Setup guide and useful info](https://github.com/DayKat/spirit-tracks/blob/main/worlds/tloz_st/docs/setup.md)
- added a [tricks and skips doc](https://github.com/DayKat/spirit-tracks/blob/main/worlds/tloz_st/docs/tricks_and_skips.md) - fixed some unimplemented glitched logic in mountain temple - fixed vanilla tears of light option still creating locations - generalized reloading of dynamic entrances based on scene on getting items that change that, allowing immediate entry into previously blocked scenes without reloading. - fixed blocked entrance text still showing after reloading dynamic entrances - fixed buggy behaviour with tears from vanilla locations in ToS 3+ - changed itemclassification for stamps to progressive_deprioritized - added a yaml option to toggle swapping models of other Zelda game's items. - added ph to model swaps (requires ph ap v8.7+) - locked item ids - removed mountain temple b1 heatoise arena warp cause it risked locations becoming permanently missable - Prevented random stalfos skull drops from triggering mountain temple 2F NW Chest - Filled in invisible staircases in ToS with source unlock option - added coordinate support for dynamic requirements and loading of address read locations - added coordinate check for opening the desert realm portals when coming from fire realm - fixed snuglar locations not properly resetting - made giving ice to kagoron connect the regions in UT even if out of logic

entry.title: Schedule I v3.6.0
entry.content:
Added bomb fragment MacGuffin goal and removed Networth only goal New goals: bomb_fragments_only: 0 missions_only: 0 missions_networth: 50 missions_bomb_fragments: 0 missions_networth_bomb_fragments: 0 bomb_fragments_networth: 0
Added deathlink options: Specify how deathlink will affect you. traps include: Heat Trap, Slippery Trap, Trash Trap, Pan Trap, TimeScale Trap, Sleep Trap Death sends players to the hospital (Cash Fee). Recommended: Use either random trap or death or both. Sleep trap is okay too. Arrested is especially brutal.
Options: - sleep trap: Ends day. - arrested: Player is arrested and loses all illegal items in their inventory. - random trap: Player will be affected by a random trap. - death: Player will be sent to the hospital upon death (Cash Fee). The mod does not reset to last save on death.
Note: Compatible with mod version 1.5.0

entry.title: Ratchet & Clank 3 v0.5.2
entry.content:
## RaC3 APWorld v0.5.2 **Branch:** staging **Date:** 2026-04-19 09:48 UTC
📜 Summary (17 changes since v0.5.1) - RAC3: Fix main RaC3 markdown file name (12ccaeca) - RAC3: Adjusted the rescue warning duration since it isn't as important as the holostar one (300523f8) - RAC3: Fix some messages getting eaten (aa92233c)
**Full changelog and compare**: https://github.com/Taoshix/Archipelago-RaC3/compare/v0.5.1...v0.5.2 ### [Setup Guide](https://github.com/Taoshix/Archipelago-RaC3/blob/staging/worlds/rac3/docs/setup_en.md) ### Notes This release was automatically generated from the **staging** branch. Latest (main) releases are recommended, as pre-releases (staging) may contain experimental or in-progress changes. ### If a location is broken and does not get sent out Go to the server console (locally or via the Archipelago room page) and run: `/send_location ` Example: `/send_location TaoshiRaC3 "Crash Site: Infobot: Aridia"`

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.1.8
entry.content: Added sprite editor

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.1.9
entry.content: Added support for the 3 other palettes

entry.title: Deltarune v1.2.2.post3
entry.content:
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
**>>> This is a pre-release. For the least issues, it's recommended to use version 1.2.1 instead. <<<**
Changelog: - Added an option to include unused items to itempool (can exclude Everybodyweapon) - [CH3] Lost Pippins, Zapper, Watercooler, Shuttah and shadowguy are now in logic only in tv world if you are playing all routes (so you can recruit them before losing them without the need to reload save. They are marked out of logic on UT if you want to reload your save) - Begin of porting game mod to a patching framework to making it open source, only chapter 1 and chapter select are currently done - [CH1] Now display location item name reward in game and in shops (some places may be missing) - [CH1] BakeSale save point have been moved to be before the story blocker - [CH1] Leaving Man's room now go to the same room before entering - [CH1] Re-did Castle Key NPC blocker - [CH1] Added some easter eggs to Kris Room (Thanks Charaster for the Archipelago trophy and keucher-mod for the flags) - [CH1] Weapons storage is now up to 48 - [CH1] Armor storage is now up to 60 - [Hotfix] Fixed CH1 warps being all selectable - [Hotfix] Fixed using cell phone crashing the game - [Hotfix] Fixed Susie having an invalid spell - [Hotfix] Leaving man room now start again forest music - [Hotfix] Using Blackshard no longer crash the game
**Because of the porting of chapter 1 only done, you can't start chapter 2 with chapter 1 completion data for now.**
Before starting, use /savereset to reset all AP and save data for this mod. Don't worry; your original DELTARUNE saves won't be affected!
Feel free to give feedback, and make sure to report any bugs!
You will only give/receive checks in the Dark World.

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.4.2
entry.content: - Fix clientfield mismatch for Shadows of Evil

entry.title: Trackmania v1.3.2
entry.content: # Changes - Added filter option for a track being a Track of the Day (Thank you BREZ!)

entry.title: Final Fantasy Mystic Quest v1.7b5
entry.content: - No longer relies on an external API for map shuffle, overworld shuffle, crest shuffle, battlefield shuffle, etc., all of these are handled by Archipelago itself. - No longer stores map shuffle data in slot data. Universal Tracker support is achieved by storing relevant yaml options and a set random seed. - Fixes an issue with the Doom Castle Access option.

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.5.6
entry.content: ## Changes - Added Blacklist and whitelist to force maps in/out the generation - Updated yaml to be cleaner

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.1.10
entry.content: Added compatibility to more sprite editors

entry.title: Brave Fencer Musashi v0.5.0
entry.content:
Added: -Open World options -quest item sanity -bizhawk client commands -additional map for Universal Tracker https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/releases/tag/Tracker_v0.2.28
Note: -Not compatible with XDelta Patches, must run unmodified game -not compatible with prior apworld generations -setup guide:https://github.com/AegeusEvander/Brave-Fencer-Musashi-AP-World/blob/main/docs/setup_en.md -Follow development and report bugs on the Archipelago gg Discord, -> Future-game-design -> Brave Fencer Musashi

entry.title: Path of Exile v1.3.3
entry.content:
# Path of Exile apworld 1.3.3 -- The one with QoL
## Patch notes: - Moving away from poptracker. - Made a new icon - Migrated tracker to GitHub Pages under https://stubobis1.github.io/pathofexile_ap/, (URL subject to change) enabling static hosting. - Should be mobile friendly! - Items page; - This page contains all of your unlocked gems, classes, passive points, and other items. - Interactive gem tooltips like the wiki are working (\^.\^) - Locations page; - Shows you what acts items first show up at, and which base items are locations in the multiworld - Hints page; - Shows your hints. - Equipment page; - This page contains information about what you can equip - links, rarity and types of weapons. - Added flask slots to the equipment page, expanding the gear grid with 5 new slots positioned below the belt/boots row - Flask system supports Normal, Magic, and Unique tiers (Rare excluded), with progression-based unlock logic and fallback checks for each tier ( this should mirror the python logic for unlocking flasks) - Flask slots now dynamically stretch across the equipment row using a flex layout for consistent spacing - Implemented tooltip caching for instant repeat hovers (and to not overload the poewiki servers) and improved positioning logic to prevent screen overflow - Yoinked assets from poptracker - Introduced a dedicated Setup & Guide page (https://stubobis1.github.io/pathofexile_ap/guide.html) this should be a nice looking introduction to setting this up - Added full Fontin font family support (Regular, Bold, Italic, SmallCaps) across tracker and guide pages - Remade the oauth sucess / failure pages. - Should also now redirect you to the tracker, with the slot data so you don't have to enter it in twice. - Created an options page, so manual editing of YAMLs is not needed as much (https://stubobis1.github.io/pathofexile_ap/options.html) - boss options hide if you aren't doing a boss run.
## Bug fixes: - Fixed a multiworld generation crash because of generating output. - Fixed an issue with random rarity flasks (someone please yell at me if your flasks aren't working right) - Fixed Offhands having 4 links, the maximum is 3. ## NOTES: - Tracker assets have been fully decoupled from worlds/poe/poeClient/static/ and are now hosted via GitHub Pages - Game data (_DATA_BASE) continues to load from remote GitHub raw URLs — no local JSON dependency required - CSS has been extracted from the tracker index.html into a reusable tracker.css file for improved maintainability - Guide page includes advanced tips, troubleshooting (e.g., OneDrive filtering issues), and command references ## As with any release of this scope, additional edge cases may exist—report any issues you encounter This release may have some other gotchas with the websites, I'm real tired and haven't tested all of the edgecases. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/stubobis1/Archipelago/compare/1.3.2...1.3.3
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/K3K41PE6IX)

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.1.11
entry.content: Fixed compatibility with 32 bits bmps

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.9.0.post2
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.9.0 This update is NOT compatible with worlds generated on previous versions!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md).
With the change of the game's development to Steam instead, development on the Itch.io version has stopped. To play this mod on the Itch.io version, use CUAP v0.8.0.
# Additions - Support for the new Steam version of Casualties: Unknown (V6) - New V6 Moodles are included in Moodlesanity, and the new recipe is included in Craftsanity [APWorld Change] # Changes - Slightly changed the popup of the Reverse Controls Trap to better fit the new way reversed controls works - Update to BepInEx v5.4.23.5 / latest v5 version # Fixes - If the first Archipelago item encountered in a session is inside a Survivor inventory, it will no longer have the incorrect description - Liquids that don't have an item counterpart will no longer throw an error when obtained through Free Samples # Known Issues - Getting two traps in quick succession can cause the incorrect slot name inside the trap Moodle - Universal Tracker shows the wrong Moodles being in logic when Moodlesanity is set to Questboard - A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with how Harmony interacts with Prefix patches on IEnumerators - If more than one Archipelago Item exists, they will all share the same sprite and description. This is a limitation of the original game, and will not be fixed - Craftsanity checks will still be sent if crafting fails due to low INT. This is a bug in the original game, and will not be fixed
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.8.0...v0.9.0

entry.title: Cobalt Core v1.2.0rc1
entry.content:
Biggest update so far! Setting it as a pre-release for now because many changes bring many bugs. Feedback and suggestions are also welcome!
After discussing with some people using the mod, I've decided to postpone the progression overhaul indefinitely as it seems to be no longer relevant and the fixes that I had imagined seem to cause more issues than it solves.
This update was therefore focused on adding daily modifiers as well as the ability to do solo and duo runs with Custom Run Options, but there are a lot of extra features that ended up being bundled with it as well!
## Major new features
- CAT will now announce when you receive items from Archipelago! (Thanks a lot to Mufflebuns who wrote a lot of dialogue for it!) - If Custom Run Options is installed, you will now be able to start with less than 3 characters. - The new `starting_characters_amount` and `cro_is_installed` YAML options control this - You still have only 2 starting cards per characters, so you may start with copies of the same cards to fill out your starting deck - Added the option to shuffle daily modifiers into the pool. - Depending on options, these will apply immediately, apply randomly on your next runs, or both - Added the `swap_character_node` option. If active, it will add a node near the middle of every zone allowing you to switch one of your characters with an unlocked character. Meaning each run is less of a commitment to specific rewards - Added the `immediate_rewards_blacklist` to the YAML, preventing items of your choice from being received immediately when unlocked - Improved controller support across the board. Controllers are now officially supported and I invite you to report bugs involving them. - You still need keyboard input for connection info and the server console
## Other changes
- Updated the AP card's border art, the should now represent the character that gave you access to them - Just like cards, you can now pick one unlocked artifact at the start of a run, and one AP artifact at cleo's shop - `shuffle_ship_parts` and `randomize_starting_cards` can now be applied on every run, instead of once at the beginning - The connection menu now has paste buttons if you want to copy/paste URLs and stuff - Some of the other players are now displayed in the main menu - Added the `fillers_can_be_traps` option - At the moment this is only relevant in some rare instances, mostly if you use `start_inventory_from_pool` - Added the `pick_missed_items_from_every_run` option, to restrict the ability to get AP items from cleo's shop to items seen this run - Removed the `rarer_checks_later` option - Added character tooltips to AP items that unlock new characters - A secret special card has been tweaked, and a new one has been added
## Fixes and tweaks
- Dialogue boxes will resize if there are too many choices (particulary relevant in shops and boot option) - Cards shown in tooltips no longer appear as unplayable - Connecting to a multiworld with an incompatible installation will now give a clearer error message
The APWorld and YAML options must both be updated.

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.1.12
entry.content: Added the ability to select which game to select the sprite for

entry.title: SMW: Spicy Mycena Waffles v1.3.2
entry.content: ### Woohoo! Just what I needed! ## Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/changelog/#1.3.2) * Probably not compatible with ongoing games ## Changes * Implemented DeathLink * Stars can nullify one death signal at a time * Hearts can also nullify one death signal if desired * DeathLink, EnergyLink and TrapLink can now be toggled in the Manager at any time * Potentially fixes Yoshi House's goal forcing a ton of eggs being panic swap targeted * Fixes alternate logic being all messed up in Universal Tracker * Fixes some unusual cases where exits will be reported as reachable out of logic in UT * Fixes boos hurting Mario while ducking or when having an active star and riding Yoshi * Fixes locations other than exits having wrong classifications on levels with swapped exits * Run no longer displays an A in the in-game tracker * Goal location is now an event * Removed `swap_level_exits` option, it stopped mattering a long time ago * Alternate Logic no longer has every setting on by default * Enemy Shuffle updates: * FoI4 now guarantees a bouncing koopa after the midway point * VoB2 no longer has Dino Rhinos on the first room * VoB2 no longer has bouncing american footballs in the third room * DS1 now has fishes after exiting the secondary room * Several logic updates I forgot to document

entry.title: Hunie Pop 2 v3.1.0
entry.content:
- (APWorld) Added options to set the min/max value for Food, Date Gifts, Girl Gifts and Arch Items in shop - (APWorld) Changed YMAL option "filler_item" from a number range to specific option choices - (APWorld) Changed Default Template option order so that relevant options are grouped together - (Client) Made Number of Items gotten on start screen properly reflect amount received - (Client) Fixed the last Arch Item in shop not being generated properly - (Client) Made Arch Items disappear from inventory after moving locations - (Client) Fixed random error in console on client start
BACKUP YOU ORIGINAL SAVE CANT GUARANTEE THAT IT WONT GET CORRUPTED Windows save location: "C:/Users/{YOUR USERNAME}/AppData/LocalLow/HuniePot/HuniePop 2 - Double Date/" Mac save location: "/Users/{YOUR USERNAME}/Library/Application Support/com.HuniePot.HuniePop2-DoubleDate/" CLIENT INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Hunie Pop 2 Installed - Download Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago plugin.zip" to the directory where "HuniePop 2 - Double Date.exe" is - play and connect to a Archipelago server APWORLD INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Huniepop 2 APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Huniepop 2 APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recomended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default Huniepop 2 YMAL POPTRACKER INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - copy contents of "Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago PopTracker.zip" into the packs folder in the poptracker install directory

entry.title: Paper Mario The Thousand Year Door v0.9.1
entry.content:
# Changelog - Removed multiple random enemy formations from the random pool. These include encounters that were inaccessible in a vanilla playthrough and encounters that only showed up in rogueport sewers after chapter 5 - Tweaked logic for some tattlesanity locations with random enemies in the sewers. - With enemy rando on, the changed fights in the sewers after beating ch.5 are now permanently inaccessible and not randomized - Some HP values have been tweaked for enemy scaling to better match the vanilla game - Randomized FP and BP is now weighted towards 3, making 0 and 6 less common. - Any badges or moves that cost 0 FP/BP respectively now stay at 0 BP/FP and are not included in the shuffle - Jolene can now be bribed. Setting names will change starting in v0.10.0 to not specify grubba - Apworld now has a proper manifest
# Bug Fixes - Fix a logic issue in ch.8 regarding the cog location not requiring yoshi or koops to access - Fix for crashes in chapter 3 related to enemy randomizer - Fix for nondescript crash on ROM boot related to shop item descriptions - Fix for yoshi egg continuing to follow you after getting the yoshi check in ch.3 - Fix for starting at rank 0 post-ch3, you will now start at 20 again after beating the chapter - Related to starting at rank 20 again after ch.3, the guard will now properly move out of the way for the minor league locker room - Fix for every encounter in ch.3 first striking you with enemy rando on - Fix for certain areas not having properly scaled stats, this could also crash your game on occasion
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jamesbrq/ArchipelagoTTYD/compare/v0.9.0...v0.9.1

entry.title: Spyro 2 v2.0.0
entry.content:
This is the alpha version of a Bizhawk client, intended to work on both Windows and Linux.
This is not a fully complete implementation, and the following issues are known: - The following options are not yet implemented and so do not yet work: - Winter Tundra Warp Options - Death Link (soon, I promise) - Progressive Sparx Health Upgrades - Destructive Spyro filler - Invisible Spyro filler - Client commands are not yet implemented - When connecting to a seed in progress, you will receive all filler/trap items again, from the seed's start. - In the Duckstation client, items that heal or hurt Sparx work with a delay, to ensure that life bottles don't overwrite the effect. The effects are currently instant for Bizhawk. - In the Duckstation client during closed world mode, Elora tells you how many talismans you have. This is not yet implemented. - If you save or auto-save in Winter Tundra, exit to the main menu, and try to load a save, the game will crash. This is *not* savefile corruption, and a hard reset before trying to load the save should work instead. - There's incorrect logic on the 5 swim gems in Autumn Plains.
Setup Notes: - This has been tested on Bizhawk 2.9.1. It was based off of the Ape Escape client, so https://github.com/Thedragon005/Archipelago-Ape-Escape/blob/apeescape/worlds/apeescape/docs/setup_en.md is likely accurate. - Connect with the generic bizhawk lua connector and the bizhawk client. - While there shouldn't be any game breaking effects from connecting early, it is preferred that you do so after the "Insomniac" sign appears in the main menu.
Please report any issues you run across!

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.5.7
entry.content: - Fixed trap weights not working in options creator

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.9.1
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.9.1 This update is compatible with worlds generated on versions v0.9.0 and above!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md). Development on the Itch.io version of Casualties: Unknown has stopped. To play this mod on the Itch.io version, use CUAP v0.8.0.
# Additions - Updated custom title screen logo that follows the new V6 logo design - Custom language support now supports all UI # Changes - Archipelago Trap moodles now show a dynamic timer to when they will end - The Deadly Moodlesanity preset now contains Severe and Critical hypoxemia, Ventricular fibrillation, Palpitations, Circulatory collapse, Severe hypotension, Hypertensive crisis, Severe hypertension, and Toxic crisis [APWorld Change] - The Difficult Moodlesanity preset now contains Palpitations and Critical hypoxemia [APWorld Change] # Fixes - Fixed `Moodlesanity - Internal bleeding` not sending # Known Issues - Universal Tracker shows the wrong Moodles being in logic when Moodlesanity is set to Questboard - A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with how Harmony interacts with Prefix patches on IEnumerators - If more than one Archipelago Item exists, they will all share the same sprite and description. This is a limitation of the original game, and will not be fixed - Craftsanity checks will still be sent if crafting fails due to low INT. This is a bug in the original game, and will not be fixed
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.9.0...v0.9.1
